documents.text: AEC demo repo now includes a transport snapshot of the Citizen Snips/Hermes Daystrom DML memory store at deployment/source/integrations/daystrom-dml/stores/hermes-runtime-store. Commit ffe776da5d6fc2c5b3ac584dbc3ba0ad93af868a on mmckeen-nv/2026_aec_cptx_demo_dml main added 35 store files (~1.05GB), validated DML health/verify, scanned for high-confidence credentials, and GitHub raw readback confirmed README, dml_state.jsonl, rag_meta.json, and rag_index.faiss.
